image:image.image:title: About Jesse Oñate · Realtor in Downey, CA
image:image.image:caption: Meet Jesse Oñate — bilingual realtor in Downey serving LA & OC. 100+ families helped. No pressure. No BS. Real advice.

image:image.image:caption: Accessibility statement for jessetek.net. Our commitment to WCAG 2.1 AA compliance and inclusive web access for all users.

image:image.image:caption: Take a free 60-second quiz to see how ready you are to buy a SoCal home this year. Personalized score, gaps to close, and a custom action plan from a Downey realtor.

image:image.image:caption: Common questions about buying and selling homes in Downey, Pico Rivera, Whittier, and surrounding cities. Real answers from a real local realtor.

image:image.image:caption: Jesse Oñate is a top-producing realtor helping millennials buy and sell homes in Downey, Whittier, Pico Rivera, and surrounding cities in LA & Orange County. No pressure. Real results.

image:image.image:caption: 42 SoCal cities ranked for 2026 home buying — by value, by schools, by lifestyle, by appreciation. From Downey to Beverly Hills, an honest take from a local realtor who covers it all.

image:image.image:title: Pre-Approval vs Pre-Qualification — Why It Matters in SoCal · Jesse Oñate
image:image.image:caption: In SoCal's competitive market, sellers don't take buyers seriously without verified pre-approval. Here's the difference between pre-qual and pre-approval, and why it costs you offers.

image:image.image:title: Down Payment Assistance in California — SoCal Buyer Guide · Jesse Oñate
image:image.image:caption: Down payment assistance can cover 3-20% of your SoCal home purchase. CalHFA, MyHome, and dozens of city-level programs. Here's what you actually qualify for and how to apply.

image:image.image:title: SoCal Real Estate Insights · Jesse Oñate Realtor
image:image.image:caption: Monthly market updates, buyer/seller insights, and real talk on Southern California real estate from Jesse Oñate. Bilingual realtor based in Downey.

image:image.image:title: Mello-Roos Explained — What SoCal Homebuyers Need to Know · Jesse Oñate
image:image.image:caption: Mello-Roos can add $3,000–$8,000 a year to your SoCal property tax bill — and most calculators don't show it.

image:image.image:title: How to Price Your SoCal Home — The First 14 Days Decide Everything · Jesse Oñate
image:image.image:caption: In SoCal, the first 14 days of a listing decide its outcome. Here's how to price your home so you maximize buyer interest, avoid the dreaded price drop, and net more at closing.

image:image.image:caption: September 2026 SoCal mortgage rate update: Fed signaling, fall buying season setup, and how Downey-area buyers and sellers should be playing the next 90 days.

image:image.image:title: Free Mortgage Rate Text Alerts — Every Thursday · Jesse Oñate
image:image.image:caption: Get a free mortgage rate update texted to your phone every Thursday at 11:30am. Stay on top of the market and time your move with confidence. No spam — just rates.

image:image.image:caption: Free interactive rent vs buy calculator with real SoCal numbers. Includes property tax, HOA, opportunity cost, appreciation, and live mortgage rates from Freddie Mac. See your break-even point.
